---
title: "Majal Summer Program: AI Track"
subtitle: "Five days: from linear regression to autonomous agents"
---

*Published July 17, 2026*

**GitHub Repository:** [iiFadel/majal-ai-track-2026](https://github.com/iiFadel/majal-ai-track-2026)

## Course Material

| Day | Topic | Status | Slides | Labs |
|:---:|-------|:------:|:------:|------|
| 1 | **AI Foundations & Supervised Learning** | 🚧 In progress | [**Open slides**](slides/day1.qmd) | [Lab 0](https://colab.research.google.com/github/iiFadel/majal-ai-track-2026/blob/main/labs/day1/Lab0_Data_Explorer_Pokemon.ipynb) · [Lab 1](https://colab.research.google.com/github/iiFadel/majal-ai-track-2026/blob/main/labs/day1/Lab1_Calorie_Predictor_Regression.ipynb) · [Lab 2](https://colab.research.google.com/github/iiFadel/majal-ai-track-2026/blob/main/labs/day1/Lab2_Mushroom_Survival_Classification.ipynb) |
| 2 | **Unsupervised Learning** | Coming soon | — | — |
| 3 | **Computer Vision & Deep Learning** | Coming soon | — | — |
| 4 | **NLP → Transformers → LLMs** | Coming soon | — | — |
| 5 | **Agentic AI: RAG → Tools → Agents** | Coming soon | — | — |

: {.striped .hover}


## How to use this

- **Slides** open in your browser, on a laptop or your phone. Some slides are interactive: drag the sliders, type in the boxes.
- **Labs** open in Google Colab. Nothing to install.
- Navigate slides with arrow keys, `F` for fullscreen, `S` for speaker notes, `Esc` for an overview of all slides.
